sections.paragraph:
Original: פּרים פּוּרים פּוּר

Transliteration: pûr pûrı̂ym pûrı̂ym

Phonetic: poor

BDB Definition:

Pur or Purim = "lot" or " piece"
  1. lot
    1. a special feast among the post-exilic Jews, to celebrate their deliverance from Haman's destruction through queen Esther's heroic actions

Origin: from H6331

TWOT entry: 1749

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
